Implement a module named counter_4bit — a synchronous 4-bit up counter with
synchronous reset.

Interface:
  - input  clk        (clock)
  - input  rst        (synchronous reset, active high)
  - output out (4 bits)

On every rising edge of clk: if rst is high, out is set to 0; otherwise out
increments by 1 (wrapping from 15 back to 0). This is a sequential circuit.
